category_sources: Official GitHub repo describes Z3 as the Z3 Theorem Prover and documents SMTLIB2 plus language APIs.
source_facts.description says Z3 is a high-performance theorem prover.
display_name_sources: Official Z3Prover repository and documentation use the display name Z3.
docs_sources: Official Z3 Guide is hosted under microsoft.github.io and linked as Z3 documentation.
Official Z3Prover API docs and GitHub wiki/README provide API and project documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/Z3Prover/z3; repo returned null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README documents SMTLIB2 input and bindings for C, C++, Java, Python, .NET and other APIs.
